displayTitle: R2-D2, BB-8 and Rey's Lightsaber on the Loose!
synopsis: BB-8 wants to borrow Rey’s Lightsaber when she accidentally leaves it behind – R2-D2 tries to keep it safe and away from BB-8 but he ends up setting it off inside the Millennium Falcon instead! With the Lightsaber slashing through the ship, will they survive and get it back to Rey?
title: R2-D2, BB-8 and Rey's Lightsaber on the Loose!
